title: Development Will Be the Defining Issue, Says Youngest BJP Candidate Rishiraj Hazarika; Strong Support for Himanta Biswa Sarma in Ranganadi
description: As Assam approaches elections, Rishiraj Hazarika, BJP candidate for Ranganadi, emphasizes a development-driven narrative, asserting that governance under Himanta Biswa Sarma has set a new standard. Hazarika reports strong public support, with large gatherings at his meetings.
